hero.title: Know your ballot. Hold power accountable.
hero.subtitle: Opus Populi gives you transparent access to propositions, representatives, campaign finance, and petition tracking — powered by AI, built for citizens.

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need to stay informed

propositions.title: Ballot & Propositions
propositions.description: Track ballot measures and initiatives in your region. Get AI-powered analysis to understand what you're voting on.

petitions.title: Petition Scanner
petitions.description: Scan petitions with your camera for instant AI verification. Track signature progress on an interactive map.

representatives.title: Representatives & Meetings
representatives.description: Know who represents you. Follow public meetings, legislative sessions, and committee hearings.

campaignFinance.title: Campaign Finance
campaignFinance.description: Follow the money. Explore contributions, expenditures, and committee spending with full transparency.

transparency.title: AI Transparency
transparency.description: Our AI commitments, system cards, and prompt charter are public. You always know how AI is used.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: GDPR and CCPA compliant. You control your data with granular consent management and full data export.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Our platform is open source. Inspect the code, contribute, and help build better civic tools.
